name: Lebanon
summary: Day 67 Tuesday. **IDF STRUCK 20+ SOUTH LEBANON LOCATIONS MAY 4** — Lebanon's National News Agency reports continuing strikes including towns where IDF earlier issued evacuation orders. Hezbollah claimed retaliatory mortar attacks on IDF positions in 2 separate incidents — IDF reported NO casualties. Cumulative since March 2: 2,659+ killed, 8,183+ wounded, >1M displaced (per Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon war via May 3 brief). One-sided escalation pattern hardens: Day 11 of 14 of trigger window (closes May 11) with NO Israeli-side civilian casualty inside Israel proper while Lebanon-side casualty rate runs 40-80/week. The May 3 brief framed Israel's use of Lebanon front 'as counter-leverage during US-Iran negotiations' — May 4 confirms continuation: same week US-Iran kinetic restart, Lebanon front parallel-pressure unchanged. Apr 23 Trump-extension of ceasefire to ~mid-May being violated daily on Lebanon-side; the framework remains technically alive but operationally hollow. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. Geographic expansion via Litani-bridge demolitions intact.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11) — full re-escalation activated

LEBANON 80+ KILLED 48 HOURS BY IDF STRIKES — CEASEFIRE OPERATIONALLY DEAD MAY 1-2
KINETIC DAY 2 — IDF STRUCK 20+ HEZBOLLAH-LINKED SITES MONDAY; 14-DAY ISRAELI-CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER STILL WATCHING

recent_signals.headline: SUBSTANTIVE CEASEFIRE COLLAPSED: HEZBOLLAH LETHAL DRONE KILLED IDF SGT

historical_summaries.summary: 6 signals. Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | At least 41 killed in Israeli air attacks on Bekaa Valley | Lebanese PM Salam demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons and restrict to political activities

31 signals. Beirut airstrike killed Hezbollah's southern front commander Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem on April 1 — the most senior Hezbollah commander kill | Israel struck Lebanon April 1 concurrent with Trump primetime address and ongoing Iran campaign | Israeli strikes killed 2 girls and wounded 40 near Tyre
